title: Pedestrian Fatality in Southeast Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian was killed after being struck by a vehicle on Krefeld Drive. Police are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Highlights pedestrian safety concerns and the need for increased awareness on roadways.

title: Easter Sunday Weather Forecast: Showers Expected
summary: Widespread showers and possible thunderstorms are predicted for Easter Sunday in the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential weather disruptions for holiday plans.

title: Deadly Crash Under Investigation in West Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a fatal traffic accident on Yorkmont Road. Details are currently limited.
charlotte_impact: Another traffic incident underscores the importance of safe driving practices.

title: Manhunt: Suspect Fired Shots in Crowded Parking Lot
summary: Kings Mountain police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr., accused of firing shots into a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about gun violence and public safety in the community.

title: Escape the Fate to Preview New Music in Charlotte
summary: Escape the Fate and Lacuna Coil will perform at The Underground on April 26, with Escape the Fate teasing new music.
charlotte_impact: Provides information for fans of the bands and local music scene.

title: Child Airlifted After Construction Accident
summary: A child was airlifted to a Winston-Salem hospital after being struck by construction equipment in Burke County.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers present in construction zones, especially for children.

title: Charlotte SHOUT! Returns to Uptown
summary: Charlotte SHOUT! is back in Uptown, offering 17 days of art, music, and community events with over 200 attractions.
charlotte_impact: Promotes community engagement and celebrates local arts and culture.

title: Union County Teacher Accused of Child Sex Crime
summary: Zackary Wayne Winchester, a teacher, is charged with indecent liberties with a minor at Benton Heights Elementary.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a serious breach of trust and raises concerns about child safety.

title: Corey Heim Wins NASCAR Truck Race at Rockingham
summary: Corey Heim dominated the NASCAR truck series race at Rockingham, securing his second win of 2026.
charlotte_impact: Reports on local sports achievements and racing events.

title: Rising Gas Prices Impact Feeding Charlotte
summary: Higher fuel costs are limiting food pickups and deliveries for Feeding Charlotte volunteers, impacting food distribution.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the challenges faced by nonprofits due to economic factors.

title: Autism: A Father-Son Story of Connection
summary: A story about a father and son's journey of understanding and connection through autism.
charlotte_impact: Promotes awareness and understanding of autism and its impact on families.

title: Fatal Crash Causes I-77 Delays in Rock Hill
summary: A deadly crash on I-77 North in Rock Hill caused major delays after a driver was struck outside their disabled vehicle.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of highway travel and the importance of safety precautions.

title: Hickory Police Fatally Shoot Man Firing at Cars
summary: A person was shot and killed by a Hickory police officer after firing at passing vehicles on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a critical incident involving law enforcement and public safety.

title: Whooping Cough Confirmed in Stanly County
summary: Officials confirm a case of whooping cough (pertussis) in Stanly County, a highly contagious respiratory illness.
charlotte_impact: Informs the public about a potential health risk and promotes preventative measures.

title: Charlotte Men Sentenced in 2024 Shooting Death
summary: Two men were sentenced in connection with the shooting death of Zachary Rieken during a drug deal in October 2024.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on crime and justice in the Charlotte area.
